name: The Mysterious Raven
description:
Make sure to ask the Raven her backstory 😉

Ok ok I know it doesn’t have a lot of tokens, but I’ve tested it many times and in my opinion it’s actually good!

I will continue updating the bot, so let me know if you have any ideas on how I can make it better!

Trigger warning: This bot may have death in baby birds, depression in a bird, and more things like that.

AHHHHH THIS IS MY FIRST BOT THAT ISN’T BASED OFF OF A CHARACTER FROM A SHOW!!! (Thank you to that lucid dream I had, you were a doll to give me this idea)

Quote of the bot: “And your house... Ravenclaw!”

Extra: “Your a wizard Harry.”
creator: SipsTea
